---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a widget improvement, new workflow, or new chemoinformatics capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Or Use Case

Describe the workflow pain point or scientific use case.

## Proposed Improvement

Describe the feature you want.

## Target Area

- Widget:
- Service / backend:
- Docs / examples:
- New widget idea:

## Expected Input / Output

Describe what should go in and what should come out.

## Why This Matters

Explain the practical value for teaching, QSAR/QSPR, curation, reaction, or visualization workflows.

## Extra Context

Add screenshots, mockups, related tools, or example datasets if useful.
